                                                                                                                    development of globalization, international financial relationship has
                                                                                                                    become an important part of international relations. The focus of the
                                                                                                                    giant countries is not the cooperation and competition in the fields of
                                                                                                                    military, but the priority to make the financial regulations. In order
                                                                                                                    to be a great country in the world, we need a brilliant strategy for
                                                                                                                    diplomatic relationship with other countries.
